caption: The scene is set on an airport tarmac next to a white airplane. The nose of the aircraft is visible, featuring the text "CASTILLU LOARR" on its side. A jet bridge is connected to the aircraft, and a logo consisting of a crown atop a circular crest is visible on the bridge's exterior wall. In the background, several ground service vehicles, including a white car and red luggage tugs, are parked on the concrete. The environment includes an airport terminal building under a clear blue sky. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains static and the scene is still; there are no visible people, and no movement or changes occur between the frames. The aircraft, vehicles, and equipment remain in the same positions from start to finish.
